{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144810D6BA4A3C2E95DCB3F85E"}"},"total":22},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7427338780042511166","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这么好的书，必须满分！哈哈(ಡωಡ)hiahiahia两个男主也很强！不管是梦还是现实，他俩都互相在乎，互相陪伴，这样的感情挺好的！爱情不一定轰轰烈烈，平平淡淡的陪伴，又一个支持自己的人也一样幸福！结尾有点快，不过结局很好！希望大家都平平安安健健康康快快乐乐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729318217,"group_id":"7295300156839169060","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世俗在左，我们在右，爱能跨越所有鸿沟！- ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2+P/L62Fs/uES8VNw/vOj07iIbtoh6L/L5ASejVFcM6","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0e984627525a44a39ce72421ae4b3148~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619486&x-signature=7KaCsRmjygKm4i414PwYRFDrT3w%3D","user_id":"1068325833553703","user_name":"清风揽月与你同赴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1068325833553703","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7295300156839169060","book_info":{"abstract":"双穿双男主+轻松+种田+经商+基建+战争+系统
前期咸鱼后期支棱受vs腹黑凶狠恋爱脑攻
关元殊意外穿越后，遇到了现代的伪情敌，励志要做个富家翁的关元殊从原本只想让自家人坐上衣食无忧的生活，可后来越来越多的人希望登上关元殊这搜破船、

正经文案
关元姝现代跟仇人同归于尽后意外穿到不知名的古代，这里不止男女两种性别，居然还有哥儿，后来他跟现代情敌带着村里人种田经商训练搞基建，还免费得了皇帝老儿送的人才大礼包，一不小心就超额完成了任务。
厥修泽表示，只要是小殊想要的通通都给他，为他打天下又如何。
系统表示，这届宿主真好带！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oa286555cb94e7f6703d661f2e0a8bb3e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"编织爱好者","author_id":"","book_id":"7295300156839169060","book_name":"穿越之我在古代搞基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7295300313995870759","read_count":"130","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"380609"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"183","tags":"双
